Setup Tools
Connect Google Sheets + Calendar
Paste your Apps Script Web App URL below. This powers automatic Sheets backup, Google Calendar reading, and Notion content loading.
Only set this after the same token exists in Apps Script Script Properties. Leave blank until then.
Connect Todoist
One-time setup. Token saved in browser only — never shared anywhere.
Todoist → Settings → Integrations → Developer → copy API token.
AI / Agent Controls
Mission Command stays read-only by default: it summarizes app, Notion, Sheets, and Calendar data. Write actions stay confirmation-gated and logged.
Mission Command
Conversational operating layer for questions, walkthroughs, routing, and diagnostics.
Live
Context window
Hidden instruction packet: identity, mission, current stats, sources, and recent memory.
Ready
Workers
Worker routing
Routes Mission Command answers through sales, content, production, finance, sync, and memory workers.
Live
Worker Status
Chat Memory
Chat history
Local sessions with clean titles, hidden metadata, and project folders.
Local
Google chat sync
Saves chat sessions/projects to Google Sheets. Sessions update existing rows by ID; Sync Audit appends one line per sync.
Ready
Rules / Permissions
Allowed sources
App state, Notion, Google Sheets, Calendar. CRM/production scopes are read through the existing bridge.
Read
Write permissions
Off by default. Any future AI write must ask first and leave an audit trail.
Locked
System Health
Archive & Backup Management
Auto-save: Starting...
Backup ready
Idle
Use Save backup to push the current app data into Google Sheets.
Reset test data
Archive/truncate test entries without touching your config or connected accounts.
Pick what to wipe in this browser
Always preserved: Apps Script URL, webhook token, Todoist token, Instagram token.
Pick which Google Sheet tabs to truncate
Rows are archived to a "Reset Audit" tab before truncation. Weekly Saves, Cycle Archives, Activity Log, State Backups are untouched.
Diagnostics
Recent checks
Run sync check to refresh live services. Activity Log remains the source of truth for backend events.
Review
Cycle Archive
Use the two-click Archive Cycle flow, then confirm Activity Log shows ping, archive, and Notion upsert.
Ready

🔑 Refresh Instagram Token

1. Go to developers.facebook.com/apps/960359013441868
2. Left sidebar → Instagram → Tokens tab
3. Click Generate Token next to your account
4. Copy the IGAA... token and paste below

Token is valid for 1 hour. Paste a new one any time data goes stale.
